title: docs: app ideas markdown cleanup
author: Nimzozo
pr_body_excerpt: Cleaned up the Markdown code in `apps/IDEAS.md` so that line breaks display correctly.

gist.headline: Tidying up the ideas board
gist.blurb: Gave the app ideas document a quick polish so the line breaks actually break where they're supposed to.
gist.summary: Fixed Markdown formatting and line breaks in the apps/IDEAS.md file to improve readability.
gist.impact: Developers browsing the app ideas list will have an easier time reading the suggestions.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee organizing a digital bulletin board, representing the cleanup of the IDEAS.md file.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot organizing a glowing lime green (#ecf874) digital bulletin board. A chunky pixel robot companion holds a neatly formatted document. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot organizing a glowing lime green (#ecf874) digital bulletin board. A chunky pixel robot companion holds a neatly formatted document. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
